titles.title: Break Thou The Bread Of Life

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Break Thou the bread of life, Dear Lord to me, As Thou didst break The loaves beside the sea; Beyond the sacred page, I seek Thee Lord; My spirit pants for Thee, Oh living Word!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Bless Thou the truth, dear Lord To me, To me, As Thou didst bless The bread by Galilee; Then shall all bondage cease, All fetters fall, And I shall find my peace, My All in All.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Teach me to live, dear Lord, Only for Thee, As Thy disciples lived in Galilee; Then, all my struggles o'er, Then, victory won, I shall behold Thee, Lord, The living One.
